title: berkheya debilis
intro: Berkheya debilis, also known as the delicate daisy or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Berkheya debilis can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
